name: systeme.io
description: All-in-one marketing platform for funnels, email, memberships, and online courses.

auth_methods.note: The Authentication docs specify using an API key sent in the HTTP Authorization header as a Bearer token (i.e., `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>`).

credential_access.note: The help article states API access is only available on specific paid plans (e.g., Growth and above) and that eligible users can generate/manage the API key from their systeme.io account/dashboard (self-serve once on an eligible plan).

api_surface.note: The developer portal is a REST API documentation site with multiple resource endpoints and sections (including Authentication and Webhooks), indicating a broad REST surface across core systeme.io objects.

buildability.note: Public REST documentation is available and authentication is via API key, but the official help article indicates API access requires being on an eligible paid plan (e.g., Growth+), making the primary blocker paid-only access.

queries: systeme.io how to get api key
